text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing about Vodka's decision to abruptly
change tours, Daiwa Scarlet calls her "lame" to
her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka contends that she's just staying true to her
own definition of cool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She poses a question to Daiwa Scarlet—what
does being number one really mean to her?
